summary: Static Same-Origin Homepage Architecture Testing Complete - ALL TESTS PASSED. Logged-in dashboard: 30 images total, ALL 30 from /homepage-banners/ (same-origin), ZERO R2 CDN images, ZERO media proxy images, ZERO video elements. Hero poster loads from /homepage-banners/the-painter-of-stars-hero.jpg with naturalWidth=800. Ken Burns animation active. Badge pulse animation present. Card click navigates to /app/story-video-studio. Static banner files return HTTP 200.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js: getStaticHeroImg/getStaticCardImg from staticBanners.js replaces all mediaUrl/SafeImage usage
staticBanners.js: 17 static banners with hero_img and card_img paths to /homepage-banners/
/public/homepage-banners/: 34 JPEG files (17 hero + 17 card variants) served same-origin
ZERO cross-origin dependencies on logged-in dashboard - eliminates Safari/mobile Chrome media delivery failures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static same-origin architecture fully verified for logged-in dashboard. Key findings: 1) ALL 30 images on dashboard from /homepage-banners/ (same-origin), 2) ZERO R2 CDN images (pub-*.r2.dev), 3) ZERO media proxy images (/api/media/r2/), 4) ZERO video elements, 5) Hero poster loads from /homepage-banners/the-painter-of-stars-hero.jpg with naturalWidth=800, 6) Ken Burns animation active on hero, 7) Badge pulse animation on cards, 8) Card click navigates to /app/story-video-studio with prefill state, 9) Static banner files return HTTP 200 image/jpeg. NOTE: Public landing page (Landing.js) still uses R2 CDN images - this is expected as the requirement was specifically for the logged-in dashboard/homepage.

static_banner_files_http_200.details: All tested banners return HTTP 200 image/jpeg

public_landing_page.details: Page loads correctly (uses R2 CDN as expected for public page)
